actions.title: Turn on MFA for all email, admin, and remote access accounts
actions.description: Use built-in MFA on core services first, especially email and admin accounts.

actions.title: Enable full-disk encryption on laptops and work devices
actions.description: Use built-in OS disk encryption and require screen lock.

actions.title: Remove shared admin accounts and use named admin users
actions.description: Stop using shared admin credentials and restrict admin access.

actions.title: Stop using free sharing tools and standardize approved apps
actions.description: Use one approved file-sharing and collaboration platform with safer defaults.

actions.title: Use managed cloud backup and test recovery
actions.description: Protect critical files and systems with simple, tested backup and restore procedures.

actions.title: Turn on automatic patching for endpoints and internet-facing tools
actions.description: Reduce risk from known vulnerabilities by keeping systems current.
